title: Wonderfully Optimized
description: Wonderfully Optimized is optimization modpack with a focus on getting 𝘳𝘦𝘢𝘭𝘭𝘺 𝘨𝘰𝘰𝘥 performance out of your game.
body:
[![Available on GitLab](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/gitlab_vector.svg)](https://gitlab.com/XDRwastaken/WonderfullyOptimized)

Make sure to update all of the mods (and Fabric MC) through the launcher you're using!

`README.md` was last updated 9/7/24
